basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 21 Senior Residents/Senior Demonstrators Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Mangalagiri
basic_details.short_information: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Mangalagiri (AIIMS Mangalagiri) has officially announced the Senior Residents/Senior Demonstrators Recruitment 2026 with 21 openings. The detailed notification was released on the official website of AIIMS Mangalagiri. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 45 years and hold a Postgraduate medical degree (MD/MS/DNB or equivalent) can submit their online applications on or before 30 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are provided below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: up to 5 years; OBC: up to 3 years; PwBD: up to 10 years (General), 13 years (OBC), 15 years (SC/ST)

qualification.details: Anaesthesiology: MD/DNB in Anaesthesiology Anatomy: MD/DNB in Anatomy OR A) M.Sc/M.Biotech Degree in the subject concerned with B) Ph.D. in the subject concerned/allied subject Biochemistry: MD/DNB in Biochemistry OR A) M.Sc/M.Biotech Degree in the subject concerned with B) Ph.D. in the subject concerned/allied subject Community & Family Medicine: MD/DNB in Community Medicine Dermatology: MD/DNB in Dermatology & Venerology Forensic Medicine & Toxicology: MD/DNB in Forensic Medicine General Medicine: MD/DNB in General Medicine General Surgery: MS/DNB in General Surgery Microbiology: MD/DNB in Microbiology Obstetrics & Gynaecology: MD/MS/DNB in Obstetrics & Gynaecology Pathology: MD/DNB in Pathology Physical Medicine & Rehabilitation: MD/DNB in Physical Medicine & Rehabilitation Physiology: MD/DNB in Physiology Radiodiagnosis: MD/DNB in Radiodiagnosis Surgical Gastroenterology: MS/DNB in General Surgery OR MCh./DNB in G.I. Surgery Trauma & Emergency: MD/DNB in Medicine/Emergency Medicine/Geriatric Medicine/Anesthesiology/Pulmonary Medicine OR MS in Surgery OR M.Ch/DNB (Trauma Surgery)

selection_process: Interview only Screening test (MCQs) if large number of applications
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Mangalagiri Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Mangalagiri to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for the AIIMS Mangalagiri Senior Residents/Senior Demonstrators posts is 30th May 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Senior Residents/Senior Demonstrators?
faq.answer: There are a total of 21 vacancies for the posts of Senior Residents/Senior Demonstrators at AIIMS Mangalagiri. These vacancies are distributed across various medical departments.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Postgraduate medical degree from a recognized university/institute or an equivalent qualification. Specific departmental qualifications are also detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST, OBC, and PwBD candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is ₹1,500/-. SC/ST candidates need to pay ₹1,000/-, and PwBD candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the range of Rs. ₹56,100/- to ₹67,700/- per month, as per the pay matrix of the government.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves an interview. However, if a large number of applications are received, a screening test (MCQs) may be conducted, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type mentioned in the notification is 'Contract'. Candidates should refer to the official notification for details regarding the duration of the contract.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct download link for the official notification PDF is available in the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What are the important dates related to the application process?
faq.answer: The closing date for applications is 30th May 2026. Important cut-off dates for OBC Non-creamy layer and EWS certificates are 1st April 2026.
